title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ABB India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ABB India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? ABB India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!
